column1: # Source of truth for the topline benchmark bar charts (docs/charts/generate.py).
# Hand-curated from docs/benchmarks.md — keep in sync when those tables change.
#   chart  — which figure the row belongs to
#   label  — the bar's category label (tool, or tool + platform)
#   group  — fqxv | other  (drives the accent-vs-muted color)
#   value  — the number the bar length encodes (sorted descending per chart)
#   vlabel — the text drawn at the end of the bar
